title: Plaza Urchin — Notice the Watcher
description: An eleven-year-old has been watching you since you arrived in the hub. She's quick, dirty, sleeps in the bell-tower. Her name is Brackish. She has not decided about you yet.

objectives.description: Spot Brackish in the great plaza or bell-tower.

breadcrumbs.content: She's eleven, watches the plaza, knows every alley. She decides about people in the first hour. The first hour ends soon.

title: Plaza Urchin — Be Kind or Be Sharp
description: Brackish needs to know which kind of person you are. Approach her with food and patience, or with a chase and a threat. Choose.

options.consequence: Brackish accepts bread. Becomes hub-wide intelligence source for the player. Will share what she sees in the plaza, including the comings and goings of every faction lieutenant.
Brackish becomes a recurring thief. Lifts a small item from the player every 4 hours of game time. Cannot be apprehended.

breadcrumbs.content: Brackish has decided. Whichever way, the hub knows now.

title: Plaza Urchin — What She's Seen
description: Brackish has been keeping mental notes. If she trusts you, she'll share three. If she doesn't, you have to earn each by guess.

objectives.description: Receive three intelligence tips from Brackish (kind path) or pry three out (sharp path).

breadcrumbs.content: Tip 1: Asbir's cavity. Tip 2: Velka's off-ledger fence. Tip 3: Ren's southern arc.
